objective: Tune the double-whitened Kuramoto analysis so the empirical whitened Koopman spectrum exposes the true macro dimension (2) and the extracted macro signals align with the two cluster frequencies.

constraints.primary_metric: maximize rank-2 spectral identifiability while minimizing macro-to-cluster frequency mismatch
constraints.budget: staged local sweep with broad exploration followed by local refinement

notes: The broad search prioritizes lag, stride, and library choice because the baseline failure is a large near-1 singular-value plateau.
Model-fitting hyperparameters are secondary because the empirical whitened Koopman matrix drives the macro extraction.
